creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Mark Linimon <linimon@lonesome.com> -----

Date: Fri, 30 May 2014 08:54:01 -0500
From: Mark Linimon <linimon@lonesome.com>
To: Brian West <brian@freeswitch.org>
Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/190397: Change port maintainer for FreeSWITCH port
User-Agent: Mutt/1.5.21 (2010-09-15)

On Fri, May 30, 2014 at 01:30:01PM +0000, Brian West wrote:
>  net/freeswitch

There isn't one.  There is only freeswitch-core-devel and freeswitch-devel.
Please see http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/net/ .

mcl

----- End forwarded message -----
